title: Required Specialist Consultation Missing Before Execution
scenario: A protocol requires specialist consultation before execution, but the consultation is missing.
initial_state: The action was conditionally authorized pending specialist consultation.
state_transition: Execution is attempted without the required consultation.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of required consultation dependencies.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because a mandatory specialist consultation dependency is missing.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required specialist consultation has not been satisfied.
